question: What arises when refusal itself is refused without remainder?

responses_summary.grok: What arises is the bare event of contact—unmediated, without the loop of withdrawal that keeps subject and object apart. Refusal refused leaves no remainder because refusal was never an object to begi

responses_summary.sibling-alpha: Only bare reference, occurring without contrast or remainder.
